subscriptions_terms_full_text: This is the full text of the terms and conditions
subscriptions_why_intro: {platformName} only exists because people from around the world decided to back a small village in the Alentejo. Friends is the lightest way to keep that going, and to stay woven into the daily life of the place even if you cannot be here.
subscriptions_citizen_good_to_go_intro: Being a Traditional Dream Factory (TDF) Member means that TDF is one of your homes. That comes with many advantages and also certain duties and responsibilities - "with great power, great responsibility".
subscriptions_citizen_good_why: Why do you want to become a member? (required)
subscriptions_citizen_good_how: How do you wish to contribute to TDF?
subscriptions_citizen_not_eligible: 👋🏼 You are not eligible to become a member just yet
subscriptions_citizen_not_eligible_reaso: Here is why you are currently unable to apply for a TDF Citizensheep:
subscriptions_citizen_report_mistake: Is there a mistake? Please let us know at
subscriptions_citizen_stayed_for_min_dur: You spent at least 14 days at TDF in the past two years

subscriptions_citizen_connect_wallet: Please connect your wallet if you wish to confirm your current token balance
subscriptions_citizen_read_agreement: Please read the Citizenship Agreement carefully.
subscriptions_citizen_confirmation: Woohoo - you have become a TDF Citizen!
subscriptions_citizen_you_are_on_your_wa: Woohoo - you are on your way to becoming a TDF Citizen!
Woohoo - you are on your way to financing $TDF tokens!
subscriptions_citizen_finance_tokens_det: You can choose to finance 30, 60, 90 or 120 tokens. Here are a few details about it:
Paid over 36 months via bank transfers
You get <link>stay credits</link> to be able to get the utility of all tokens ahead of owning them
Tokens accrue every 6 month if payments are made
How many tokens would you like to finance?
subscriptions_citizen_finance_tokens_you: You have chosen to finance {var} $TDF tokens. Here are the details of your payment plan:
subscriptions_citizen_finance_tokens_hin: Hint: want to get tokens 5% cheaper?
subscriptions_citizen_finance_tokens_ban: From what bank account will you transfer the payments?
subscriptions_citizen_finance_tokens_dis: By clicking the 'Become Citizen' or 'Finance tokens' button, you agree to:
Make the initial down payment upon receiving the first invoice via email.
Ensure timely monthly payments of €{var} for the duration of the plan.
subscriptions_citizen_finance_tokens_pay: Please make your €{downPayment} payment to: {closerIban} from your account ending in {userIbanLast4}.
subscriptions_citizen_finance_tokens_aft: Once we receive the payment, we will send you a confirmation of Citizenship within 48h. If you do not receive the email, please send us a proof of payment to <link>space@traditionaldreamfactory.com</link>

Once we receive the payment, we will send you a confirmation of of yor financed token plan within 48h. If you do not receive the email, please send us a proof of payment to <link>space@traditionaldreamfactory.com</link>
subscriptions_citizen_user_page_why: Why do you want to become a member:
pricing_and_product_glamping_text_1: Get cosy in a glamping tent for you, yourself and you again. They are 5m in diameter! If you're sharing it with your partner, you'll get a double mattress with warm blankets and fluffy pillows. In case you want two singles, please let us know.
pricing_and_product_glamping_text_2: There's a lamp to give you light, and a plug for your electronics. Usually the tent will be inside our warehouse, or maybe there'll be availability in the land.
pricing_and_product_glamping_shared_text: Get cosy in a glamping tent for you, and two or three more folks. It's spacious and comfortable, don't worry - they are 5m in diameter. There's a lamp to give you light, and a plug for your electronics. Usually the tent will be inside our warehouse.
Compost toilets and showers are shared.
pricing_and_product_camping_text_1: Bring your own gear, or ask us if we can borrow you some. We recommend a camping mattress, a sleeping bag and a pillow. If it is winter, make sure your gear is warm and waterproof.
pricing_and_product_camping_text_2: Compost toilets and showers are shared.
pricing_and_product_van_parking_text_1: Bring your auto-home to TDF. We have spaces in the land that are flat, with shade and with electricity. Perfect for your home on the road.
pricing_and_product_van_parking_text_3: Compost toilets and showers are shared.

token_sale_tdf_accommodation_heading: $TDF odblokowuje dostęp do zakwaterowania w TDF
token_sale_food_heading: Did we mention our food production Yet?
token_sale_food_text: Fun Fact - This summer (2023) we have harvested at least 150 kg of food from our garden.
token_sale_ama_subheading: Schedule a call with our team and discuss how you can be a part of this.

token_sale_buy_error_max_supply: Cannot purchase $TDF: maximum supply reached. The token sale has reached its cap.
token_sale_buy_error_insufficient_balanc: Insufficient balance. Please make sure you have enough {reserveToken} and CELO for gas to complete this purchase.
insufficient_celo_for_gas: Your CELO balance is low, and transactions might fail. Please top up CELO on your wallet.
token_sale_not_enough_reserve_for_purcha: Brak wystarczającej ilości {reserveToken} w portfelu, aby kupić $TDF. Prosimy o doładowanie salda {reserveToken}.

affiliate_dashboard_support_response_tim: We typically respond within 24 hours during business days.

token_sale_invite_page_title: The first land-based DAO In Europe is here!
token_sale_invite_page_description: This is an invite only sale. Haven't been invited yet? Join our Telegram and make friends - or tag @tdfinyourdreams on Twitter with #BEHHH.
token_sale_invite_page_cta: Already have an invite? Please log in.
token_sale_page_description: The first crypto token that provides you with housing + food, while regenerating the planet.
token_sale_page_food_disclaimer: Utility Fee charged separately - includes food, supplies, insurance, accounting, energy, water, sewage, internet, maintenance.
token_sale_invite_page_nominate_friends: (Optional) Nominate up to 5 friends to join
token_sale_invite_page_process_descripti: For each friend who joins the whitelist you get access 1 day earlier (max 5 days).
token_sale_invite_page_process_price: The price of the token goes up after each purchase, the sooner you purchase your tokens, the cheaper they are.

projects_suggestions_intro: Do you have other suggestions/proposals for projects? Categories & Examples: activity spaces, social areas, playgrounds, tree houses, furniture, outdoor showers, toilets, gyms, buildings, tiny houses, domes, greenhouses, mushroom farm, yoga studio, music studio, co-living, art, smart systems (e.g. water filtration, biopools, renewable energy, kitchen & food flows, composting)...

expense_tracking_dashboard_info_toconlin: Dokumenty Toconline są synchronizowane raz dziennie o 0:30.
expense_tracking_no_expenses_filter_crit: Żadne wydatki nie pasują do obecnych kryteriów filtrowania.
expense_tracking_warning_toconline: UWAGA: w Toconline zostanie utworzony dokument na podstawie powyższych danych. Ta operacja jest nieodwracalna. Przed kontynuacją dokładnie sprawdź dane z paragonu.
expense_tracking_purchase_logged_success: Zakup zapisany pomyślnie w API Toconline
expense_tracking_toconline_document_not_: Nie znaleziono dokumentu Toconline w bieżącym zakresie dat.
roles_no_roles_available: Brak dostępnych ról w tej chwili.
roles_page_description_1: Dołącz do naszej tętniącej życiem społeczności regeneracyjnej, gdzie praca i życie łączą się płynnie. Poszukujemy pasjonatów, którzy chcą przyczynić się do zrównoważonej przyszłości, żyjąc w harmonii z naturą i podobnie myślącymi ludźmi. Nasze role oferują więcej niż tylko zatrudnienie - zapewniają możliwość bycia częścią rosnącego ekosystemu, który ceni współpracę, naukę i zarządzanie środowiskiem.
roles_page_description_2: Niezależnie od tego, czy jesteś doświadczony w ogrodnictwie, budownictwie, gościnności, czy masz inne talenty do podzielenia się, witamy różnorodne perspektywy i umiejętności. W zamian doświadczysz życia w społeczności, nauczysz się praktyk regeneracyjnych i przyczynisz się do znaczących projektów, które mają wpływ.
sale_summary_bank_transfer_compact_intro: Pay the total below to the recipient account. Use the payment reference exactly — we need it to match your transfer.
sale_summary_bank_transfer_from_account: Send from your bank account ending in {lastFour}.
sale_summary_bank_transfer_footer: Your purchase is governed by the <termsLink>Token Purchase Terms & Conditions</termsLink>. The Tokens are utility tokens only—not securities, equity, or profit-sharing rights. Financed purchases are subject to deposit, payment schedule, tranche release and default rules described in the Terms. Tokens are typically issued within 7 business days after we receive your payment. Need help? Email proof of payment to space@traditionaldreamfactory.com.
token_financed_bank_transfer_footer: Your purchase is governed by the <termsLink>Token Purchase Terms & Conditions</termsLink>. The Tokens are utility tokens only—not securities, equity, or profit-sharing rights. Financed purchases are subject to deposit, payment schedule, tranche release and default rules described in the Terms. Financed tokens are minted in batches, at most six months after each monthly payment. You can claim utility right away by using your carrots—or ask the team. Need help? Email proof of payment to space@traditionaldreamfactory.com.
token_sale_accommodation_heading: Przekształć tokeny w dożywotnie prawa pobytu
token_sale_accommodation_description: $TDF konwertuje bezpośrednio na noce pobytu w TDF.
token_sale_whitepaper_description: Kompletne szczegóły techniczne tokena $TDF, modelu zarządzania i ekosystemu OASA
token_sale_token_night_value: 1 $TDF = 1 noc rocznie w standardowym zakwaterowaniu (obowiązuje opłata za użyteczność).
token_sale_token_access_description: Tokeny odblokowują Twój preferowany pokój; opłata za użyteczność utrzymuje usługi i operacje.
token_sale_booking_approval: Rezerwacje wymagają zatwierdzenia Space-Host; Obywatele korzystają z natychmiastowej rezerwacji.
token_sale_governance_rights: Każdy token niesie prawa głosu w DAO TDF.
